title: Chain 1/8: Flight Delay
scene: 机场广播你的航班延误，你问柜台。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 您好，航班延误两小时，机械检修。
turns.en: Hello. Your flight is delayed two hours for maintenance.

turns.cn: 会错过转机吗？下一班去芝加哥。
turns.en: Will I miss my connection? Next flight to Chicago.

turns.cn: 我查一下……来得及，登机口会改。
turns.en: Let me check… You should make it. Gate will change.
Can you print a new boarding pass?
Here you go. New gate C twelve.
Thank you.

title: Chain 2/8: Missed Connection
scene: 你错过了转机，在柜台改签。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 刚落地，上一班延误，赶不上芝加哥那班了。
turns.en: I just landed. The delay made me miss Chicago.

turns.cn: 抱歉，最近一班今晚八点，要吗？
turns.en: Sorry. The next one is eight PM tonight. Want it?
Yes. Any meal vouchers? It's a long wait.

turns.cn: 延误超过三小时，给您十五块餐券。
turns.en: Delay over three hours. Here's a fifteen-dollar meal voucher.
Okay. Will my bags transfer automatically?
Yes. Pick them up in Chicago.

title: Chain 3/8: Airport Lounge
scene: 你有信用卡权益，进机场休息室。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 请出示登机牌和会员卡。
turns.en: Boarding pass and membership card, please.
Here you go. Three-hour layover.

turns.cn: 欢迎，淋浴间在那边，餐食自助。
turns.en: Welcome. Showers are over there. Food is self-serve.
What's the Wi-Fi password?
On the card at the table. It's free.
Thank you.

title: Chain 4/8: Gate Change
scene: 登机口临时变更，你向工作人员确认。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 去丹佛的航班改登机口了吗？App 显示 B7。
turns.en: Did the Denver flight change gates? The app shows B seven.

turns.cn: 改到 B15 了，走过去十分钟。
turns.en: Moved to B fifteen. Ten-minute walk.
Does boarding time change?
No. Still three twenty.
Okay. I'd better head over.

title: Chain 5/8: Duty Free Shopping
scene: 转机间隙你在免税店买礼物。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 最后登机前三十分钟结账哦。
turns.en: Please check out thirty minutes before boarding.

turns.cn: 这盒巧克力免税吗？去国内。
turns.en: Is this chocolate tax-free? Flying domestically.

turns.cn: 国内航班含税价，国际才免税。
turns.en: Domestic flights pay tax. Duty-free is international only.
I'll still take it. Souvenir gift.
Gift bag?
Yes, please.

title: Chain 6/8: Security Again
scene: 国内转机需要重新安检。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 笔记本电脑单独放筐，液体拿出来。
turns.en: Laptop in its own bin. Liquids out, please.
I just bought this water. Do I dump it?

turns.cn: 过安检不能带水，那边有过滤饮水。
turns.en: No liquids through security. Filtered water over there.
Okay.
You're clear.

title: Chain 7/8: Board Connecting Flight
scene: 你开始登转机航班。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 登机牌和 ID 看一下。
turns.en: Boarding pass and ID, please.
Here you go. Still seat twenty-two C?

turns.cn: 对，飞机小，可能换座位，上机问空姐。
turns.en: Yes. Smaller aircraft—seat might change. Ask the flight attendant.
Enough overhead bin space?

turns.cn: 早登机够，晚了可能要托运。
turns.en: If you're early, yes. Late boarders may need to gate-check.
Got it. Thanks.

title: Chain 8/8: Arrive at Destination
scene: 转机后你终于抵达芝加哥，取行李。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 行李还没出来，正常吗？转机过来的。
turns.en: Bags aren't out yet. Is that normal? I connected.

turns.cn: 转机行李稍慢，您的航班在这转盘。
turns.en: Connected bags take a bit longer. Your flight is on this carousel.
There it is. Blue suitcase.

turns.cn: 出口左转打车，祝您愉快。
turns.en: Taxis are left out the exit. Have a good stay.
Finally made it. Thank you!
